title: Sendinblue vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Sendinblue vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Sendinblue and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Sendinblue is built for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Sendinblue wins for transactional email and SMS campaigns, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Sendinblue or HubSpot?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Sendinblue?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
